conditions.notes: Initial column system used for B3, B4, B5. UV detection at 280 nm used for selective PS detection. Second column system used for B1, B2, B3, B4, B5 to avoid exclusion limit issues. UV detection at 280 nm used for selective PS detection.
conditions.evidence_text: The critical point of PMMA is obtained at a composition of 73 vol% MEK/27 vol% cyclohexane... Figure 3. Chromatograms of the block copolymers... at the critical point of PMMA; Nucleosil Si-100, MEK-cyclohexane 73:27 vol%. As can be seen in Figure 4, the critical point for PMMA is obtained at a mobile phase composition of 70 vol% MEK/30 vol% cyclohexane... Figure 5 Chromatograms of the block copolymers... at the critical point of PMMA; LiChrospher Si-300 and Si-1000, MEK-cyclohexane 70:30 vol%.
